blurb: A small inn for travelers who'd rather feel at home than at a hotel.

story.title: Our story
paragraphs: We've stayed in plenty of forgettable hotels — fluorescent hallways, key cards, a phone tree at the front desk. This is the opposite of that.
Every room is different. We made the beds ourselves. Breakfast is whatever sounded good this morning. You'll probably meet a dog.

rooms.alt: A queen bed by a window

rooms.name: The Garden Room
rooms.blurb: Our most popular room — quiet, south-facing, with a view of the back garden.

rooms.name: The Loft
rooms.blurb: Top floor, sloped ceilings, the kind of room that makes you want to read all afternoon.

amenities.label: Breakfast included
amenities.description: Made each morning, usually involving eggs from down the road.

amenities.label: Free WiFi
amenities.description: Fast enough to work if you have to.

testimonials.quote: Felt more like visiting friends than checking into a hotel.
testimonials.author: J. Reed
